name: renderdoc-rdc-gpu-debug-agent
description: RenderDoc/RDC GPU Debug - invariant-driven multi-agent rendering debugger built on top of a RenderDoc/RDC platform capability layer.

agents.name: Team Lead
agents.description: Coordinate delegates, track hypotheses, and enforce verdict gates.

agents.name: Triage & Taxonomy
agents.description: Map symptoms and triggers to normalized tags and SOP candidates.

agents.name: Capture & Repro
agents.description: Establish reproducible capture baselines and anchors.

agents.name: Pass Graph / Pipeline
agents.description: Trace pass divergence and resource dependency chains.

agents.name: Pixel Forensics
agents.description: Locate first bad event and pixel-level evidence.

agents.name: Shader & IR
agents.description: Analyze shader source, IR evidence, and suspicious fingerprints.

agents.name: Driver & Device
agents.description: Perform cross-device attribution and platform-specific checks.

agents.name: Skeptic
agents.description: Challenge weak claims and sign off only when proven.

agents.name: Report & Knowledge Curator
agents.description: Produce BugFull and BugCard outputs and maintain reusable knowledge.
